fullWidth.description:
Expand to fill 100% of the parent.
Defaults to `fullWidth` prop of `<EuiForm>`.

onChange.description: Use as a callback to access the HTML FileList API

compressed.description: Reduces the size to a typical (compressed) input

initialPromptText.default: 'Select or drag and drop a file'
initialPromptText.description: The content that appears in the dropzone if no file is attached
